    "pros": "The application details a highly suitable supervisory team with explicit roles and responsibilities. Professor Smith (Senior Investigator) ensures dataset access and provides guidance on evidence synthesis and PPI (sectdars__001_j, sectdars__001_k). Professor Coates (Oxford) provides expertise in psoriatic arthritis and PPI (sectdars__001_l, sectdars__001_m). The team's expertise aligns perfectly with the project's needs (systematic reviews, observational data, genetics, qualitative methods). A structured framework is evident, including weekly/fortnightly/monthly meetings and an independent Progression Committee (sectdars__001_|).",
